en: The teacher is here.

ab: kakaa’in tu lalu, mabiskava mal’anuhu sian alnunuhuan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: asi’ima a aip, islunghu mais kutun, taskuna mapahainan!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: asitau mais kutunin, kaudiip a kata kutunin pismali!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: namapikua a kasu mais kutun tu cinmut i?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: mais kutunin hai niciu, nataskun a saikin mas cina, kausian kiukai.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?
I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: masnanava! madahpa a inaak cian, namuunata a saikin.
ch: A:老師!我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: adu mahtu a saikin kaudiip tal’ima i?
en: May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: masnanava! madahpa a inaak bungu, na’islunghu hanian.
ch: A:老師!我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: masnanava! na’isluhu a saikin mais muhna’in tu asitasa, nakaudiip a saikin mapa’iu.
ch: A:老師!我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Langus?

ab: madahpa a isaicia cian, isian unataan a saia.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Dahu?

ab: masnanava, madahpa a ituDahu buthul, islunghu aip.
en: Teacher, Dahu has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Abu come?
She has a fever.
